summary: Clean fix that removes a redundant conditional toast branch. The deposit progress is tracked separately by usePerpsDepositStatus, so no user feedback is lost. All tests pass.

comments.body: The `shared.submitting()` toast factory in `usePerpsToasts.tsx` (line ~590) is now dead code — it's only referenced by its own unit test. Consider removing it in a follow-up to keep the toast options clean.
